description: bot_01 is a synthetic BotAccount entity in a minimal Twitter-style social graph, functionally defined by its directed repost relationship (weight 0.60) toward group_a_01; it has no attributed bot type or coordination network, serving as a lightweight, behaviorally anchored node for smoke-testing舆论 simulation logic.
semantic_prompt: Find all BotAccount entities that repost content from group_a_01 with measurable edge weight in the minimal graph seed, especially those used in timing-aware Twitter simulation smoke tests.

description: CAMEL-AI is a research-oriented organization focused on advancing collaborative multi-agent AI systems, best known for initiating the OASIS project—a framework for scalable, socially grounded LLM-based simulation with explicit social graphs and temporal event support.
semantic_prompt: CAMEL-AI is an AI research organization that develops multi-agent simulation frameworks like OASIS; it emphasizes structured social interaction modeling, timed events, and open-source agent ecosystems.

description: group_a_01 is a CitizenUser node in a minimal Twitter-style social graph, characterized by actively following KOL kol_01 (edge weight 0.80) and serving as an original content source reposted by bot_01 (edge weight 0.60); its stance_score of 0.20 indicates low ideological alignment or neutrality in simulated discourse.
semantic_prompt: Find users who follow influential KOLs and simultaneously act as primary content sources for bots in minimal Twitter simulation graphs; prioritize those with low stance scores and explicit follow/repost edges.

description: News is a generic MediaOutlet entity representing news and blog data sources within the Real-World Data Sources category; it serves as a foundational, schema-level placeholder for text-based media in lightweight graph-based simulation workflows—especially for initializing Twitter-style舆论 simulations with timing and social topology constraints.
semantic_prompt: This entity represents a generic news/blogs media outlet used as a text data source in real-world simulation contexts, particularly for bootstrapping minimal Twitter-like舆论 models with scheduled events and explicit social graphs.

description: 666ghj is the sole author and creator of MiroFish, a tool designed for minimal Twitter-style舆论 simulation on README-based knowledge graphs, with explicit support for timed events and social relationship modeling.
semantic_prompt: Who is the creator of MiroFish, and what is their role in building a Twitter-like simulation tool grounded in README-derived graph structures?

description: Blogs is a MediaOutlet entity representing decentralized, user-authored digital publishing platforms that contribute unstructured text data to the real-world data ecosystem; it is semantically distinct from institutional news outlets by its informal authorship, lack of editorial gatekeeping, and high topical diversity.
semantic_prompt: Identify blogs as non-institutional, text-based digital publishing sources authored by individuals or communities, emphasizing their role in generating real-world, unstructured textual data for analysis.
